extracted.title: MAINTENANCE SCHEDULE for TC Louisiana Intrastate Pipeline
extracted.description:
TC Louisiana Intrastate Pipeline Maintenance Schedule has been updated as of 4/22/26

Please refer to the Maintenance Schedule found on the TC Louisiana Intrastate Pipeline Informational Postings under Construction and Maintenance.

Please note that the information posted is proposed and subject to change.

Please direct any questions to your Account Coordinator, Customer Service Representative, or the Nominations and Scheduling hotline @ 800-827-5267

Additionally, the following file(s) can be located on Informational Postings under Construction and Maintenance
2026 TCLI System Planned Maintenance Schedule 20260422.pdf
